title: Review Rule Packs y Repo Quality Gate dry-run
wave: Ola 4 — Repo intelligence y revisión industrial

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-39 agrega un gate dry-run local sobre motores existentes y rule packs declarativos. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, modelos, UI, sandbox, patch apply, Git write ni ejecución de código analizado. Extiende la línea Fase C ya aprobada.

pass_criteria: RepoQualityGate integrates RepoAnalyzer, CodeReviewEngine, optional PatchReviewEngine and PolicyEngine.
The command returns PASS, FAIL, BLOCK or ERROR through CommandResult.
Warnings are advisory and do not block by default.
FAIL/BLOCK findings from integrated engines propagate to gate status.
block_criteria: The gate ignores BLOCK findings from integrated engines.
The gate applies patches or mutates files.
The gate executes Git write, refactor execution or deploy.
The gate uses LLMs, network or external APIs.
The gate blocks on informational warnings by default.
risks: Rule severity defaults may need tuning per repository.
The default code-review target is intentionally bounded to avoid legacy false positives.
The gate is not a replacement for SAST/SCA, license scanning, coverage, CI/CD or human review.
Future sprints should add patch preflight, sandbox, ChangeSet and rollback integration.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-40 — Patch preflight con verificación segura
